title: hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory
summary: Unified efficient fine-tuning framework for 100+ LLMs and VLMs, published at ACL 2024. Supports LoRA, QLoRA, RLHF, MoE, and quantization across Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, GPT and more. 72,118 stars, Apache 2.0.
chinese_summary: 统一高效微调 100+ LLM/VLM 的开源框架（ACL 2024 论文），支持 LoRA/QLoRA/RLHF/MoE/量化等 20+ 技术，72,118 星，Apache 2.0。模型微调领域事实标准。
